inspiration: Modern flat vector game UI art
scene: A very dark, muted {{grid_material}} surface filling the entire 4:5 portrait canvas edge-to-edge with absolutely no borders or frame lines, serving as a non-intrusive game board background with very faint {{theme_name}}-themed motifs barely visible at low opacity.

subjects.description: very dark muted {{grid_material}} base with extremely subtle tonal shifts and faint distressed grunge overlay, near-black overall tone
subjects.size: fills entire portrait canvas seamlessly from edge to edge
subjects.interaction: foundation for colorful gameplay blocks placed above

style: flat vector, bold cel-shaded, 2-3 tonal steps, graphic cartoon game art
lighting: very dim ambient top-down lighting with 2-3 flat cel-shaded tonal steps, no realistic highlights, overall dark mood
mood: restrained, grounded, culturally inspired minimalism, dark and subdued

background.details: flat very dark {{grid_material}} surface with faint distressed grunge overlay; very subtle {{theme_name}} motifs ({{motifs_short}}) embossed at extremely low opacity; absolutely no grid lines, no frame lines, no border lines, no rectangular outlines of any kind

composition: seamless edge-to-edge texture with evenly distributed tonal variation across full canvas, no focal points, no framing elements, designed to not draw attention from foreground gameplay
medium: digital vector illustration with subtle rasterized grunge overlay
details: fills entire canvas edge-to-edge as a seamless continuous texture
2-3 tonal shades maximum, all very dark
very dark base color {{bg_shadow}} covering 95% of surface
overall brightness well below 30% — should read as near-black with subtle texture
faint cultural motifs only — must not interfere with gameplay readability
absolutely zero border lines, frame lines, rectangular outlines, or edge decorations
the texture must look the same at all edges — no visible framing whatsoever
usage_notes: This is a base layer only. Foreground blocks use brighter, higher-contrast colors. Do not increase texture contrast. Maintain flat vector readability. Avoid photorealistic rendering or 3D lighting. The image must be a seamless dark texture with zero decorative borders.
